title: Create: Gunpowder Recipe
description: Enables a fully automatable Gunpowder recipe designed specifically for the Create mod.
body:
About the Mod
Struggling to get enough Gunpowder for your Elytra rockets or TNT explosions? Tired of building massive, laggy creeper farms? This lightweight Fabric mod is the solution!

It seamlessly integrates with the Create mod, adding a logical and fully automatable recipe for Gunpowder. You can easily set up a factory to produce endless fireworks and TNT!

How it works: Mix 1x Sand, 1x Gravel, and 1x Flint in a Basin with a Mechanical Mixer to yield 2x Gunpowder. No heating is required!

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79c8716cc5fd32a4be19bfdfef737b70759cea01.png)

Why these ingredients?
All three ingredients (Sand, Gravel, Flint) can be fully automated using vanilla mechanics and Create's crushing/washing systems. This rewards players who want to engineer a clever assembly line instead of just farming mobs.

Dependencies
To use this mod, you must have the following installed:

Fabric API

Create (Fabric)

Modpacks
You are absolutely free to include this mod in any CurseForge modpack!

The Create: Gunpowder Recipe Team
